```js title=index.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["index"], {
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
"use strict";
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
/* import */ var _shared__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./shared.js");
/* import */ var _shared__rspack_import_0_default = /*#__PURE__*/__rspack_require.n(_shared__rspack_import_0);
Promise.resolve(/* import() */).then(__rspack_require.bind(__rspack_require, "./index.js"));

console.log("index1");


},
"./shared.js"() {
console.log("shared");


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```

```js title=index2.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["index2"], {
"./index2.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
"use strict";
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _shared__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./shared.js");
/* import */ var _shared__rspack_import_0_default = /*#__PURE__*/__rspack_require.n(_shared__rspack_import_0);
__rspack_require.e(/* import() */ "index_js").then(__rspack_require.bind(__rspack_require, "./index.js"));

console.log("index2");


},
"./shared.js"() {
console.log("shared");


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index2.js"));

}
]);
```

```js title=index_js.js
"use strict";
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["index_js"], {
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
/* import */ var _shared__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./shared.js");
/* import */ var _shared__rspack_import_0_default = /*#__PURE__*/__rspack_require.n(_shared__rspack_import_0);
Promise.resolve(/* import() */).then(__rspack_require.bind(__rspack_require, "./index.js"));

console.log("index1");


},

}]);
```
